chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 8928 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.39257/2018 2. For hearing of main case 13.03.2025 Jam Zeeshan Ali, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Pursuant to last order learned counsel submits under instructions that the impugned notice is being withdrawn forthwith subject to the right of exchequer to initiate proceedings if permissible under the law. In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioner states that petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
